source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly asks for the SMILES of the transition-state structure shown in the image
solving depends on reading a molecular drawing rather than extracting enough information from text alone
multi_step: solver must interpret the depicted chemical structure and convert it into a SMILES representation
solver must ignore non-structural visual elements ('ignoring the arrows') before matching to an answer
there are 4 choices, so the task involves structure recognition plus option discrimination rather than a single direct lookup
verifiability: choices are explicitly provided, making the final answer space closed and easy to check
answer_text exactly matches one listed option: 'O=NO.O=N[OH2+]'
asset_registry_record shows registry_passed=true with image and answer assets present

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，registry_passed=true，核心语义支撑完整
该题明确依赖图像中的过渡态结构来判断，图像资产已齐备，具备较高收录价值
答案可验证性高：给出了封闭选项，且答案与选项文本可直接核对
未见资产缺口或风险标记，没有足够理由降为 low_priority 或 reject
